Increases the maximum range of the Possessed Chain by +4 metres.

name: Larry's Remains
description:
The skeletal remains of Larry Cotton, covered in a thick, sticky layer of blood.
Increases the Solving time of the Lament Configuration by +2 seconds.
"We want the man who did this." — Pinhead

name: Slice of Frank
description:
A slab of Frank's face after his torture at the hand of the Cenobites.
Survivors suffer from the Exhausted Status Effect while carrying the Lament Configuration.
"The Cenobites gave me an experience beyond limits. Pain and pleasure, indivisible." — Frank Cotton

name: Torture Pillar
description:
A dangling slab covered in the gore of past victims.
Reduces the Timer duration for starting a Chain Hunt by -6 seconds.
"This isn't for your eyes." — Pinhead

name: Chatterer's Tooth
description:
A fragment from a Cenobite whose mouth chatters endlessly.This tooth, having broken from his jaw, is finally silent.
Grants the ability to see the Aura of the Lament Configuration.
Picking up the Lament Configuration deactivates an on-going Chain Hunt and grants the Undetectable Status Effect for 25 seconds.

name: Greasy Black Lens
description:
A lens from the sunglasses of an obese Cenobite whose fleshy rolls droop down his face and neck.
The Auras of Survivors are revealed to for 6 seconds after hitting them with a Possessed Chain Attack.

name: Impaling Wire
description:
A wire that pierces the cheeks of a Cenobite, while revealing the gaping wound on her neck.
Causes a bonus Chain to spawn on Bound Survivors, when they use the environment to break one.

name: Original Pain
description:
"The first pin pushed into Pinhead's skull.Such pleasure and pain."
Survivors breaking free from the Possessed Chain suffer from the following effect:
Their Aura is revealed to you for 8 seconds.
"No tears, please. It's a waste of good suffering." — Pinhead

name: Engineer's Fang
description:
A sharp tooth from the maw of a fleshy, scorpion-like creature, known to accompany Cenobites on their grim undertakings.
Causes healthy Survivors to become injured when hit with a Possessed Chain Attack, but does not bind them with additional Chains.
This increases the Closing time of the Gateway by +0.25 seconds.
Reduces the number of bonus Chains spawned when injured Survivors are hit with a Possessed Chain Attack to +1.
"We have such sights to show you." — Pinhead

name: Iridescent Lament Configuration
description:
A glass-like puzzle box moulded from The Fog itself.This replica differs from the original, providing altogether new powers.
Shields the Aura of the Lament Configuration from Survivors who are farther than 24 metres from it outside of a Chain Hunt.
"You opened it. We came." — Pinhead

name: Bead Maze
description:
"A developmental toy used to enrich the minds of captive children."
Modifies Worldbreaker with the following effect:
The second phase of the Worldbreaker Timer is increased by 2.5 seconds for each living Survivor.

name: Mid-Century Radio
description:
"It sat silent in the Creel's dining room until the slaughter was about to begin."
Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability while using Worldbreaker:
Survivors more than 32 meters away have their Auras revealed while interacting with Grandfather Clocks.

name: Orderly ID
description:
"Bears the face of Henry Creel as he appeared before he was changed by another dimension."
Modifies Vine Attack with the following effect:
While not in Worldbreaker mode,  the aiming range is increased by 2 meters.

name: Stained Glass Mural
description:
"A design once found on the Creel family door. Now it darkens the door of another dimension."
Modifies The Upside Down with the following effect: 
While on cooldown, breaking Pallets and Breakable Wallsdecreases that cooldown by 12 seconds.

name: Bloody Roller Skate
description:
"A memento of the fury that Eleven was capable of."
Modifies the Undergate Attack with the following effect:
Grants the 20 % Haste Status Effect for 1.5 seconds.

name: Clock Hands
description:
"Hands of the Creel family's grandfather clock, corrupted by Henry's dark power."
Modifies the Grandfather Clocks with the following effect:
Causes Survivors to gain the Oblivious Status Effect while interacting with the Grandfather Clocks and for 12 seconds after.

name: Gutted Supercom
description:
"A broken communication device that now crackles to life at the most terrifying times."
Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability while using Vine Attack:
The Aura of a Survivor hit by Vine Attack is revealed to you for 1.5 seconds.

name: Shattered Wrist Rocket
description:
"A once-powerful slingshot, now laid to ruin."
Modifies Undergate Attack with the following effect:
The explosion from the Undergate Attack breaks Pallets instantly and damages Generators.

name: Smashed Cassette Deck
description:
"They once used music to escape Henry's grasp. Without it, they do not stand a chance."
Modifies Worldbreaker with the following effect:
All Survivors start with one Worldbreaker token. When Worldbreaker is activated for the first time, all Survivors lose their Worldbreaker token. 1 less Grandfather Clock appears on the map.

name: Electrode Cap
description:
"Used to measure the brain's activity. In the lab, nothing goes unnoticed."
Modifies Worldbreaker with the following effect:
At the start of the second phase, Survivors more than 26 meters away have their Auras revealed to you for 6 seconds.

name: Forged Death Certificate
description:
"A piece of paper used to prove the death of a powerful person who was very much alive."
Modifies Vine Attack with the following effect:
Applying a Worldbreaker Token on any Survivor afflicts the Killer with Undetectable Status Effect until the next Worldbreaker Mode activation.

name: Neck Tendril
description:
"He was furious when the tendril was torn from his neck as Max escaped his mind realm."
Modifies Vine Attack with the following effect:
While in Worldbreaker mode,  Survivors hit by Vine Attack gain the Haemorrhage and Mangled Status Effects for 70 seconds.

name: Pizza Goggles
description:
"Used while Eleven entered sensory deprivation, they rid the user of distractions and focus the mind."
Modifies The Upside Down with the following effect:
Cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds.
Modifies Undergate Attack with the following effects:
Attack radius is decreased by 90 %.
Attack cool-down is reduced by 80 %

name: Victor's Razor Blade
description:
"In his own grief, Henry's father used a hidden blade to take out his own eyes."
Modifies Worldbreaker with the following effect:
Upon ending, injured Survivors gain the Broken Status Effect for 20 seconds.

name: Black Widow Spider
description:
"A terrifying spider that is no longer a mere hallucination."
Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability while using The Upside Down:
The Aura of the furthest survivor more than 36 meters is revealed to you for 3 seconds.

name: Broken Skateboard
description:
"A cool way to get around, smashed by a furious brother as a means of control."
Modifies Worldbreaker with the following effect:When Worldbreaker activates the following effects trigger for 65 seconds
Increases vaulting speed by 30 %.
Pallet and Window auras are revealed within 32 metres

name: Electroshock Collar
description:
"A cruelly efficient way of training and punishing the facility's prisoners."
Modifies The Upside Down with the following effect: 
When exiting, all Vault locations within 32 meters are blocked for 12 seconds.

name: Rabbit Remains
description:
"Before massacring his family, Henry started small, killing rabbits and leaving their corpses strewn about town."
Modifies Undergate Attack with the following effect:
Survivors standing in or entering the area of effect gain the Exhausted Status Effect and for 10 seconds after.
Modifies The Upside Down with the following effect:
Increases cool-down by 5 seconds.

name: Chess Piece
description:
"One of the few forms of entertainment while in the facility, it helped the students learn logic and tactics."
Modifies the Vine Attack with the following effect:
Gains two charges, and has it's attack radius reduced by 40 %

name: Iridescent Soteria Chip
description:
"A chip that once limited his powers is now a source of even greater power."
Modifies Worldbreaker with the following effect:
Upon activation, grants the Undetectable Status Effect and the Auras of Survivors with at least one Worldbreaker Token are revealed to you when they are within 12 meters. This lasts until you perform a Vine Attack,  enter The Upside Down,  or when Worldbreaker ends.

name: Brian's Intestine
description:
The small intestine of Brian Irons, chief of the RPD.It is an appetising sight for zombies.
Increases the Movement Speed of Zombies by +0.25 m/s.

name: Damaged Syringe
description:
Medical equipment that fared poorly during the chaos that overwhelmed Raccoon City.
Increases the Injection time of Vaccines by +5 seconds.

name: S.T.A.R.S. Field Combat Manual
description:
A manual of compiled S.T.A.R.S. close-range combat knowledge, edited by Chris Redfield.
The Auras of Zombies are highlighted to you in yellow for 6 seconds when they hit a Survivor.

name: Visitor Wristband
description:
An electronic Umbrella wristband for visitors to the facility.It also doubles as a tracking device.
Increases the Survivor-Detection range of the Zombies by +2 metres.
Increases the Field of View of the Zombies by +10 °.

name: Admin Wristband
description:
An electronic Umbrella wristband for administrators of the facility.While allowing access to secure areas, it also doubles as a tracking device.
Increases the Survivor-Detection range of the Zombies by +4 metres.
Increases the Field of View of the Zombies by +17.5 °.

name: Adrenaline Injector
description:
A hormone that heightens senses and prepares the body to fight.
Increases the Duration of Killer Instinct after a Survivor uses a Vaccine by +3 seconds.

name: Marvin's Blood
description:
The contaminated blood of a Raccoon City Police Officer.
Increases the Gain to Mutation Rate after hitting Survivors with a Tentacle Strike Attack by +0.5 points.
"All you need to know is that this place will eat you alive if you're not careful." — Marvin Branagh

name: Mikhail's Eye
description:
While little was left of Mikhail, his left eyeball survived the blast that killed him.It remains a tasty treat for zombies.
Increases the Movement Speed of Zombies by +0.35 m/s.

name: Zombie Heart
description:
The heart of an eviscerated zombie.It is considered hazardous waste as it is certainly teeming with viruses.
Increases the Gain to Mutation Rate after hitting Zombies with a Tentacle Strike Attack by +0.75 points.
"Words won't work on this thing." — Leon Scott Kennedy

name: Licker Tongue
description:
A sticky prehensile tongue that easily wraps around anything it touches.
Survivors becoming Contaminated suffer from the following effect:
Increases the duration of the Hindered Status Effect by +1 second to 3 seconds.
"It's like... a nightmare." — Claire Redfield

name: Plant 43 Vines
description:
The tangled remnants of a plant infected with the T-Virus, it killed one of the researchers who developed it.
Increases the Opening time of Supply Cases by +4 seconds.

name: Serotonin Injector
description:
A hormone that slightly relaxes the user for when stealth is required.
Grants the Undetectable Status Effect for 15 seconds, after a Zombie is disintegrated by any means.

name: T-Virus Sample
description:
A sample of the T-Virus developed by Umbrella Corporation, it causes extreme mutations and brain damage in its subjects.
Increases the Gain to Mutation Rate after hitting Zombies with a Tentacle Strike Attack by +1 point.

name: Tyrant Gore
description:
A damaged sample from a T-002 Tyrant that died in combat.There are signs of severe burns.
Reduces the Respawn time of disintegrated Zombies by -7.5 seconds.
Increases the Gain to Mutation Rate after hitting Zombies with a Tentacle Strike Attack by +0.75 points.

name: Broken Recovery Coin
description:
A coin depicting a bird framed by a laurel wreath.It is broken in half.
Reduces the number of Supply Cases in the environment by -1.
"This is not how I imagined my first day." — Leon Scott Kennedy

name: Depleted Ink Ribbon
description:
Who will save them now? There is something about this ink ribbon being dry that energises zombies.
Reduces the Respawn time of disintegrated Zombies by -5 seconds.
Increases the Movement speed of Zombies by +0.5 m/s.
Once the Exit Gates are powered, disintegrated Zombies respawn in the Exit area.
"Look, just so you know... this is the last fucking time." — Jill Valentine

name: Jill's Sandwich
description:
It is tragically squished and dripping with blood from a recent battle.Despite that, it has a delicious aroma that cannot be missed.
The Auras of Survivors unlocking a Supply Case are revealed to you for 12 seconds after they succeed.

name: Ne-α Parasite
description:
A parasite used in the development of Nemesis T-Types, it is capable of hijacking its host's brain.
Survivors suffer from the Oblivious Status Effect for 60 seconds after becoming Contaminated, or until they cure themselves with a Vaccine.

name: Iridescent Umbrella Badge
description:
A glass-like badge moulded from The Fog itself.It represents a corporation that pushed far beyond ethical and humane science.
Survivors suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for 60 seconds after using a Vaccine.
"Commitment, honesty, integrity. These are the core values that create the foundation of Umbrella Corp." — Doctor Matt Gorkis

name: Shattered S.T.A.R.S. Badge
description:
A symbol of hope for Raccoon City, utterly destroyed.
Increases the Movement Speed of Zombies by +1.5 m/s for 60 seconds each time a Generator is completed.
"S.T.A.R.S..." — The Nemesis

name: Broken Tiara
description:
"A dazzling stage prop worn by a Pharoah's daughter, as distracting as it is fake."
Modifies the Glowing Fungus with the following effect:
Causes Survivors to suffer from the Oblivious Status Effect while under its effects.

name: First Libretto
description:
"She felt as if she could walk on air after landing a role in her first opera."
Whenever you hook a Survivor afflicted with Leeched, you benefit from the following effect:
Reduces the Consumption rate of Headlong Flight by -30 % for 15 seconds.

name: Luckless Mouse
description:
"A game of cat and mouse always gets the blood pumping."
Modifies Headlong Flight with the following effect:
Increases its Charge capacity by +2 Charges.

name: Sticky Lozenge
description:
"A simple tablet to moisten a dry throat, often taken before an audition."
Modifies Regurgitate with the following effect:
Displays a preview of the impact zone while charging it.

name: Chunk of Malai
description:
"A varied source of protein contributes to good gut health."
Modifies the Glowing Fungus with the following effect:
Incurs a stack-able -8 % Efficiency penalty per Leeched Survivor to its Depletion rate of the Leech Meter, up to a maximum of -32 %.

name: Crumpled Sheet Music
description:
"Before her desperation, she hoped that continued practice would be enough to succeed."
Successfully hitting a Survivor with a Leeching Gland triggers the following effect:
Causes Headlong Flight to instantly gain +12 Charges.

name: Defective Metronome
description:
"The metronome sparks as it plays at a frenetic pace."
Modifies the Glowing Fungus with the following effect:
Causes Survivors to suffer from the Exhausted Status Effect while under its effects.

name: Pig's Eye
description:
"It still glistens with saliva."
Modifies the Glowing Fungus with the following effect:
Survivors eating it while at least 40 metres from your current location have their Auras revealed to you for 6 seconds.

name: Wriggling Parasite
description:
"A fragile organism that has an unusual effect on its host."
Modifies the Leech Meter with the following effects:
Increases its Charge rate by +16 %.

name: Dulled Knife
description:
"A stage prop, symbolic of a woman's gambit in an attempt to save her lover on death's row."
Modifies Headlong Flight with the following effect:
Reduces its Consumption rate by -25 %.
Modifies the Glowing Fungus with the following effects:
Causes Survivors eating it to benefit from the following additional effects for 5 seconds:
Grants a +5 % Haste Status Effect and the Elusive Status Effect.

name: Framed Newspaper
description:
"She had once made it onto the entertainment section of the city's newspaper, but she wanted more."
Modifies Headlong Flight with the following effects:
Increases its Charge capacity by +6 Charges.
Increases its Recharge rate by +15 %.
Raises its Activation threshold to 50 %.

name: Janjira's Hand
description:
"One of the few distinguishable parts that remained of her friend."
Whenever a Generator is completed, Janjira's Hand triggers its primary effects:
Causes Headlong Flight to instantly gain +2 Charges.
Increases its Recharge rate by +25 % for 15 seconds.
Once the last Generator is completed, Janjira's Hand triggers its secondary effects:
Instantly recharges Headlong Flight.
Increases its Recharge rate by +25 % for the remainder of the Trial.

name: Spattered Handkerchief
description:
"A sign that something was very wrong presented itself, but she chose to ignore it."
Once the Exit Gates are powered, Spattered Handkerchief triggers the following effects:
Causes all remaining Survivors to suffer from Leeched I.
Causes all remaining Glowing Fungi to start decaying.
Activating Corporeal Weave no longer spawns a new Glowing Fungus.

name: Theatre Binoculars
description:
"A pair of glasses that have watched many tragedies."
Successfully hitting a Survivor not currently afflicted with Leeched with an Intestinal Whip attack triggers the following effect:
The Auras of all other Survivors within 24 metres are revealed to you for 6 seconds.

name: Lorenza's Remains
description:
"Even her pet bird would fall victim to The Krasue's thirst for blood."
Survivors afflicted with Leeched also suffer from the following effects:
Tier I: Blindness Status Effect.
Tier II: -4 % Hindered Status Effect.

name: Mysterious Elixir
description:
"A liquid moulded from The Fog itself.Though similar to the concotion she drank, there seem to be slight alterations."
Modifies Regurgitate with the following effect:
Hitting Windows with a Leeching Gland causes them to become Marked.
This effect can affect multiple objects at a time.
Vaulting a Marked Window by any means triggers the following effect:
Blocks it for 10 seconds and removes its Mark.

name: Queen's Sceptre
description:
"The stage prop of a vengeful queen who demands blood."
Successfully hitting a Survivor with an Intestinal Whip attack triggers the following effect:
Causes a Leeching Gland to spatter from their location.

name: Rotten Swine
description:
"A revolting meal that left her disgusted when she awoke."
Modifies Regurgitate with the following effect:
Hitting Breakable Walls, Generators, or Pallets with a Leeching Gland causes them to become Marked.
This effect can only affect a single object at a time.
While interacting with the Marked Prop, you benefit from the following effect:
Increases the Action speed for Breaking and Damaging by +15 %.

name: Chicken Head
description:
"Believed by some to have mystical properties, this particular sample was lodged in The Krasue's throat after a feed."
Modifies Unbodied Flesh with the following effects:
All Survivors are afflicted with Leeched I at the start of the Trial.
Increases the initial count of Glowing Fungus by +2.

name: Shredded Gown
description:
"She tore at her clothes and into her flesh as her body burned."
Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability while using Corporeal Weave:
The Auras of all Survivors who are either within 8 metres of a Glowing Fungus or holding one are revealed to you for 5 seconds.

name: Blurry Photo
description:
"The photo was found at an abandoned campsite.The campers were never seen again."
Modifies the Teleport ability with the following effect:
Increases the Recovery rate back to full Movement speed after Teleportation by +7 %.

name: Punctured Eyeball
description:
"The station was a scene of madness.The officers had seemingly turned on each other."
Survivors performing the Dispelling action successfully while both injured and in the Weakened State suffer from the following effect:
Inflicts the Deep Wound Status Effect.

name: Rabbit's Foot
description:
"The unlucky creature's remains were found by a tree, its intestines wedged between its teeth."
While charging UVX, you benefit from the following primary effect:
Pools of Blood are highlighted in bright red.
Survivors damaged by UVX suffer from the following secondary effect:
Inflicts the Haemorrhage Status Effect for 45 seconds.

name: Sketch Attempt
description:
"The victim’s child was given paper and crayons at the station, while he waited for his father to pick him up."
Survivors in the Blast Area of the UVX Projectile suffer from the following effect:
Inflicts the Oblivious Status Effect for 20 seconds.

name: Device of Undisclosed Origin
description:
"Was the thing made on Earth? Or somewhere else entirely?"
While within range of seeing the Aura of a Hallucination, Survivors suffer from the following effect:
Inflicts the Oblivious Status Effect.

name: Last Known Recording
description:
"She studied Musique Concrète before she disappeared, her screams the last sound on the tape."
Modifies Hallucinations with the following effect:
Reduces the range at which Survivors can see their Auras by -35 %.

name: Notebook of Theories
description:
"His studio apartment was empty and reeked of black mould.The book was the only thing left."
Survivors hit by an airborne UVX Projectile suffer from the following effect:
Increases the duration of the Hindered Status Effect by +2 seconds to 5 seconds.

name: Slashed Backpack
description:
"When the hiker was rescued from the mountain pass, she insisted her companion would never wander off alone."
Hitting a Hallucination with the UVX Projectile triggers the following effects:
Causes the Hallucination to disintegrate, creating a Blast Area.
Reduces the Spawn timer of your next Hallucination by -65 %.

name: Victim's Map
description:
"He thought the key to solving the mystery lay beyond the forest, and feared he would never return."
Survivors performing the Stare Down The Unknown action successfully suffer from the following effect:
Triggers Killer Instinct for 3 seconds.

name: B-Movie Poster
description:
"The movie was rumored to be state-funded propaganda, made specifically for something called Project Apple-Pie."
Survivors damaged by UVX suffer from the following effect:
Inflicts the Broken Status Effect for 30 seconds.

name: Footprint Cast
description:
"The cast sits in the Museum of the Weird in Sarasota, Florida and has long since been debunked."
Whenever a Survivor enters the Weakened State, Footprint Cast triggers its effect:
Reduces the Spawn timer of the next Hallucination by -15 seconds.

name: Front-Page Article
description:
"The assailant had torn gaping holes in the walls of the cabin, and drove the family into the woods."
Whenever you break a Breakable Wall or a dropped Pallet, Front-Page Article triggers its effect:
Reduces the Spawn timer of the next Hallucination by -50 %.

name: Hypnotist's Watch
description:
"Hypnotherapy was recommended to recover repressed memories.What emerged from his mind would be his undoing."
Survivors hit by an airborne UVX Projectile suffer from the following effect:
Inflicts the Exhausted Status Effect for 15 seconds.

name: Vanishing Box
description:
"The magician was popular at children's parties, and quickly became the top suspect."
Modifies UVX with the following primary effect:
Increases the default value of the Spawn timer of Hallucinations by +120 %.
Whenever one or multiple Survivors complete a Generator, Vanishing Box triggers its secondary effect:
Causes all participating Survivors to enter the Weakened State.

name: Discarded Milk Carton
description:
"She decided to take the long way home, and waved goodbye to her friends before parting ways."
Modifies UVX with the following effects:
Doubles the Bounce strength of the UVX Projectile by changing the following:
Increases Bounciness by +8 %.
Reduces Friction by -15 %.

name: Homemade Mask
description:
"The killer had made the mask in the shed in his backyard, where he would bring the others when the sun went down."
Survivors performing the Dispelling action successfully suffer from the following effect:
Inflicts the Blindness Status Effect for 60 seconds.

name: Obscure Game Cartridge
description:
"Some maintained Project Apple-Pie evolved over time, turning to new forms of media for results."
After teleporting to a Hallucination, Obscure Game Cartridge triggers its effect for 20 seconds:
Increases the Action speeds for Breaking, Damaging, and Vaulting by +30 %.

name: Serum Vial
description:
"The molecular structure of the substance was synthesised in the lab, but its effects could never be replicated."
Upon entering the range of seeing the Aura of a Hallucination, Survivors suffer from the following effect:
Inflicts the Exhausted Status Effect for 15 seconds.

name: Captured by the Dark
description:
"The documentary purported that the disappearances were linked to small-town cinemas.Audiences left the theater feeling uneasy."
Modifies UVX with the following effects:
All Survivors start the Trial in the Weakened State.
Reduces the number of Hallucinations that can exist at the same time by 1.

name: Iridescent OSS Report
description:
"The report was redacted to the point of being meaningless.But still, theorists tried to extract meaning from it."
Modifies UVX with the following effects:
Reduces the Cool-down duration of the Teleport ability by -5 seconds.
Increases the Lifetime of Decoys by +10 seconds.
Causes Decoys to emit a Terror Radius and Red Stain.

name: Cerberus Talon
description:
"A sharp memento from one of Dracula's most terrifying guards."
Modifies the Scent Orbs with the following effect:
Increases their Aura-Reveal distance by +100 %.

name: Clock Tower Gear
description:
"A piece of the great clock tower, a reminder of the inevitability of time itself."
Modifies the Shapeshift ability with the following effect:
Reduces its Cool-down time by -5 %.

name: Ruby Circlet
description:
"An enchanted headpiece that brings even the mightiest of flames to heel."
Modifies the Hellfire attack with the following effect:
Reduces its Cool-down duration by -5 %.

name: Traveller's Hat
description:
"A wide-brimmed hat that once belonged to a well-travelled man."
Modifies the Shapeshift ability with the following effect:
Reduces the Transition time between Forms by -5 %.

name: Blood-Filled Goblet
description:
"The blood of his victims sustains him and makes him an even greater hunter."
Modifies the Scent Orbs with the following effect:
Extends their Lifetime by +60 %.

name: Magical Ticket
description:
"A strange artifact once used to transport across Dracula's castle."
Modifies the Teleport ability with the following effect:
Increases the Teleporation speed by +10 %.

name: Moonstone Necklace
description:
"A simple necklace by day, but its power comes to life in the dark."
Modifies the Vampire Form and the Wolf Form with the following effect:
Reduces the Terror Radius by -8 metres.

name: White Wolf Medallion
description:
"A trinket once used to call a great spirit guide."
Modifies Wolf Form with the following effect:
Increases its Killer Instinct duration by +1 second.

name: Winged Boots
description:
"Long used by their wearers to move quickly."
Modifies the Teleport ability with the following effect:
Increases its Teleportation range by +20 %.

name: Force of Echo
description:
"An artifact that grants bats even greater senses in the dark."
Modifies the Scent Orbs with the following effect:
Increases their Spawn rate by +10 %.

name: Killer Doll
description:
"One of Dracula's minions, and a reminder that all are his playthings."
Modifies the Pounce attack with the following effect:
Increases the Cool-down bonus from collecting Scent Orbs by +30 %.

name: Pocket Watch
description:
"A tool that bends the rules of time itself."
Modifies the Teleport ability with the following effect:
Instantly recharges it after breaking a Pallet.

name: Sunglasses
description:
"They protect against bright lights, in addition to looking cool."
Modifies the Hellfire attack with the following effects:
Increases the number of Pillars of Flame by 1.
Increases its Charge time by +25 %.

name: Sylph Feather
description:
"An enchanted feather that grants its holder great agility."
Whenever you break a Pallet, Sylph Feather gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens:
Reduces the Cool-down duration of the Hellfire attack by a stack-able -5 % per Token, up to a limit of -25 %.

name: Cube of Zoe
description:
"A strange box whose presence creates something from nothing."
Whenever a Generator is completed, Cube of Zoe triggers its effect for 10 seconds:
Causes the immediate area around The Dark Lord to continuously spawn Pillars of Flame.

name: Lapis Lazuli
description:
"A stone said to bring luck to its holders, or take it from their enemies."
After teleporting to a Window, Lapis Lazuli triggers its effect:
Calls upon The Entity to block it to all Survivors for 8 seconds.

name: Medusa's Hair
description:
"A snakelike memento from one of Dracula's most ancient and fearsome minions."
Causes all Survivors within 8 metres of your Teleport destination to suffer from the following effect:
Inflicts a -8 % Hindered Status Effect for 4 seconds.

name: Warg's Fang
description:
"A mighty tool of destruction taken from one of Dracula's most dangerous allies."
While in Wolf Form , whenever the Pounce attack becomes available, you benefit from the following effect:
The Auras of all Survivors whose Scent Orbs you have collected are revealed to you for 5 seconds.

name: Alucard's Shield
description:
"A family heirloom that blocks its bearer's enemies at every turn."
Whenever an Exit Gate is opened, Alucard's Shield triggers its effect:
Causes the area inside the Exit Gate to continuously spawn Pillars of Flame.
"Oh, but this world invited me. Your own kind called me forth with praise and tribute." — Dracula

name: Iridescent Ring of Vlad
description:
"A unique relic belonging to Dracula. It is said none can approach the Dark Lord without it."
Modifies the Hellfire attack with the following effect:
Causes the Pillars of Flame to home-in on nearby Survivors.
"Enough talk... have at you!" — Dracula

name: Crystal Ball
description:
"Used by spellcasters for centuries to scry upon friend and foe alike."
Whenever the Dispelling Sphere Spell detects a Survivor, you benefit from the following effect:
Increases the duration of Killer Instinct by +1 second.

name: Raven's Feather
description:
"A material component most typically used by the Fly spell."
Modifies the Fly Spell with the following effect:
Extends the Flight duration by +0.5 seconds.

name: Tattered Headband
description:
"An enchanted accessory once owned by a powerful summoner. It still carries a whisper of its former magic."
Modifies the Flight of the Damned Spell with the following effect:
Extends the Flight range of the Flying Entities summoned by the Spell by +4 metres.

name: Trickster's Glove
description:
"A glove once belonging to an archane trickster whose mastery of Mage Hand clings to its fibers."
While casting the Mage Hand Spell to block an upright Pallet, you benefit from the following effect:
Increases its Hold time by +0.3 seconds.

name: Glass Eye
description:
"A material component used to cast spells of detection."
Modifies the Dispelling Sphere Spell with the following effects:
Increases the its radius by +2 metres.
Increases its Travel speed by +10 %.

name: Lantern of Revealing
description:
"Even those who evade your attacks cannot evade your gaze."
Survivors narrowly missed by the Flying Entities summoned by the Flight of the Damned Spell suffer from the following effect:
Their Auras are revealed to you for 3 seconds.

name: Potion of Speed
description:
"A curious concoction that downgrades the rules of physics to mere suggestions."
While casting the Fly Spell, you benefit from the following effect:
Reduces the Interaction Cool-down time after casting it by -0.15 seconds.

name: Ring of Spell Storing
description:
"A magical ring that rewards those who are well-prepared."
You benefit from the following effect:
Reduces the default Recharge time of all Spells by -1 second.

name: Ring of Telekinesis
description:
"Its arcane energy crackles to life when its user manipulates objects from afar."
While casting the Mage Hand Spell to block an upright Pallet, you benefit from the following effect:
Increases your Vaulting speed by +10 % for the next 10 seconds.

name: Boots of Speed
description:
"A simple click of their heels grants their wearer incredible pace."
After casting the Mage Hand Spell, you benefit from the following effect:
Grants a +3 % Haste Status Effect for 2 seconds.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
description:
"Its colours are constantly shifting, making you more difficult to detect from afar."
While casting the Fly Spell, you benefit from the following effect:
Reduces your Terror Radius by -22 metres.
This effect lingers for 6 seconds after ending Fly.

name: Ornate Horn
description:
"Once used to rally troops to battle, its very presence brings great armies to bear."
Modifies the Flight of the Damned Spell with the following effect:
Increases the number of Flying Entities summoned by the Spell by 1.

name: Pearl of Power
description:
"Its shimmering face energises mages who hold it, allowing them to cast more spells."
Successfully hitting a Survivor with a Basic Attack triggers the following effect:
Reduces the remaining Recharge time of all Spells currently on cool-down by -2 seconds.

name: Staff of Withering
description:
"Its necrotic power brings its targets closer to death."
Whenever a Survivor enters radius of the Dispelling Sphere, they suffer from the following effect:
Inflicts the Exhausted Status Effect for 30 seconds.

name: Bag of Holding
description:
"The realm itself bends to its astounding capacity, populating trials with even more to take."
Survivors opening a Treasure Chest suffer from the following effects:
Inflicts the Oblivious Status Effect for 15 seconds.
At least 2 Treasure Chests in the environment will roll a 1 on their Dice Roll.

name: Cloak of Invisibility
description:
"A powerful magic item, envied by rogues and the conflict-averse alike."
Whenever all four Spells are on cool-down at the same time, you benefit from the following effect:
Grants the Undetectable Status Effect for 20 seconds.

name: Dragontooth Dagger
description:
"Made from the actual tooth of a dragon, its edge is jagged and cruel."
Successfully hitting a Survivor equipped with a Magic Item with a Basic Attack triggers the following effect:
Inflicts the Haemorrhage and Mangled Status Effects for 60 seconds.

name: Robe of Eyes
description:
"When worn, none can escape its bearer's unyielding gaze."
Whenever you cast any Spell, all Survivors within 6 metres of a Treasure Chest suffer from the following effect:
Their Auras are revealed to you for 4 seconds.

name: Iridescent Book of Vile Darkness
description:
"The ultimate compilation of cruelty, wickedness and depravity."
Whenever you use the Fly Spell to pass through a Window, the following effects apply:
Blocks the Window for all Survivors for 45 seconds.
Modifies the Flight of the Damned Spell with the following effects:
Reduces the Flight height of the Flying Entites by -0.7 metres, allowing them to also damage Survivors who are crouching.
Reduces the number of Flying Entities summoned by the Spell by 3.
"What chance do you have against my centuries of preparation?" — Vecna

name: Vorpal Sword
description:
"A powerful magical artifact whose blade has severed many a head from its accompanying body."
Whenever an injured Survivor enters radius of the Dispelling Sphere, they suffer from the following effect:
Inflicts the Broken Status Effect for 30 seconds.
Modifies the Mage Hand Spell with the following effect:
Causes it to break dropped Pallets, instead of lifting them.
This action takes 4 seconds to complete.
"Only one has ever crossed me and lived to regret it." — Vecna

name: Healing Salve
description:
A bitterly pungent paste of crushed roots, which were marinated in fish brine for three days and in wine for two.Applied on skin rashes.
Reduces the Cool-down duration of Vile Purge and Corrupt Purge by -0.25 seconds.

name: Limestone Seal
description:
A cylindrical seal made from porous stone that displays a ritualistic scene with winged deities.
Increases the Infection duration on Props hit with Vile Purge by +20 seconds.

name: Olibanum Incense
description:
Precious resin extracted from Boswellia trees, used during ceremonies for their sweet citrusy fragrance.
The Auras of Survivors cleansing at a Pool of Devotion are revealed to you for 4 seconds.

name: Prayer Tablet Fragment
description:
A fragmented stone tablet with a corrupted incantation originally used to purge illnesses and feelings of general malaise.
Increases the Infection duration on Props hit with Vile Purge by +40 seconds.
Increases the Infection gained while performing Interactions for Survivors by +100 %.
Grants +100 % bonus Bloodpoints for Score Events in the Deviousness Category.
Vile Purge no longer affects Survivors directly.

name: Blessed Apple
description:
A perfectly ripe fruit to break fast during the purification ceremony.Delicious.
Causes 1 Pool of Devotion to spawn in the Corrupted state.

name: Emetic Potion
description:
A mustard-water based syrup that induces vomiting when consumed.Used to purge evil from the body.
Increases the Infection gain from Vile Purge by +30 %.

name: Haematite Seal
description:
A cylindrical seal forged from a metallic hard-stone, engraved with bird-headed beings that stood next to strange machines.Used as a container for sanctified ashes.
Increases the Infection duration on Props hit with Vile Purge by +30 seconds.

name: Potent Tincture
description:
A frothing, murky liquid that permeates the air with an acute aroma of herbs and alcohol.Applied directly on blisters.
Reduces the Cool-down duration of Vile Purge and Corrupt Purge by -0.4 seconds.

name: Prophylactic Amulet
description:
A fragmented stone tablet with a corrupted incantation originally used to purge illnesses and feelings of general malaise.
Reduces the number of available Pools of Devotion by -2.

name: Ashen Apple
description:
A peeled apple rolled into sanctified ashes.Eating such a fruit warded off the malignantly envious spirits of the deceased.
Causes 1 Pool of Devotion to spawn in the Corrupted state.
Increases the number of available Pools of Devotion by +1.

name: Exorcism Amulet
description:
An obsidian amulet to ward off sickness during exorcism rituals. Inscribed with a prayer to the God of Mayhem and Pestilence.Fills the wearer with fierce devotion.
Increases the duration of Corrupt Purge by +10 seconds.

name: Incensed Ointment
description:
A dark waxy paste, laced with cedar sap that diffuses a sweet and earthy aroma.Applied directly on infected skin.
Ingesting Corruption causes all Survivors in your Terror Radius to scream and reveal their locations to you.

name: Infected Emetic
description:
A disgusting syrup of unknown origin.The thick yellow liquid is consumed to induce vomiting.Used to purge evil from the body.
Increases the Infection gain from Vile Purge by +40 %.

name: Rubbing Oil
description:
A beaker of rubbing oil with expectorant quality.Exudes the evergreen scent of laurel and rosemary.
Increases the Charge speed of Vile Purge and Corrupt Purge by +50 %.

name: Devotee's Amulet
description:
A blood stone amulet carved intricately with the effigy of the Babylonian God of Mayhem and Pestilence.Fills the wearer with boundless devotion.
Increases the duration of Corrupt Purge by +20 seconds.

name: Severed Toe
description:
The decaying severed toe of Adiris, weaved on a thread and worn as an amulet around the neck.Radiates with vile power.
Increases the Infection gained while performing Interactions for Survivors by +50 %.

name: Vile Emetic
description:
A foul-smelling and half-congealed potion of unidentifiable ingredients.Consumed to rapidly induce vomiting.Used to purge evil from the body.
Increases the Projectile speed of Vile Purge and Corrupt Purge by +10 %.

name: Worship Tablet
description:
A stone tablet adorned with gold, showing the drawings and writings of a corrupted incantation used originally to worship forgotten deities.
Increases the Ingestion speed at Pools of Devotion by +100 %.
Increases your Movement speed while holding Corrupt Purge by 4.4 %.

name: Black Incense
description:
A dark paste made of sharp osseous shavings.The inhaling of its foul fumes sharpens the mind's eye.
The Auras of vomitting Infected Survivors are revealed to you for 3 seconds.

name: Iridescent Seal
description:
A translucent cylindrical seal moulded from The Fog itself with the effigy of The Plague.Its surface is warm and pulsates with The Entity's power.
Automatically enter Corrupt Purge whenever a Generator is completed.
Reduces the duration of Corrupt Purge by -20 seconds.

name: Jewel Beetle
description:
A beautiful and valuable insect.While difficult to capture, it is worth a pretty penny.
Grants +100 % bonus Bloodpoints for Virulent Bound Score Events.
Reduces the remaining duration of a Bound by -50 % after colliding with a Survivor.

name: R.P.D. Shoulder Walkie
description:
Without the ability to communicate, the cops of Raccoon City are isolated and don’t stand a chance.
Reduces the duration of the first Bound by -20 %.
Increases the duration of the second Bound by +20 %.

name: Unicorn Medallion
description:
An old medallion depicting a majestic unicorn.It was placed in storage for years.
Increases the duration of the first Bound by +20 %.
Reduces the duration of the second Bound by -20 %.

name: Uroboros Tendril
description:
The result of decades of Bio Organic Weapon research.It will not rest until it has swallowed the entire world.
Increases your Movement speed while charging Virulent Bound by +5 %.

name: Bullhorn
description:
The commands screamed into this device riled up some and disoriented others.
Survivors suffer from the Oblivious Status Effect for 30 seconds after using a First Aid Spray.

name: Chalice (Gold)
description:
A chalice of pure gold used to celebrate the summer solstice.
Increases the remaining duration of a Bound by +50 % after colliding with a Survivor.

name: Leather Gloves
description:
Gloves of a cold, calculating schemer.They impart an air of icy professionalism.
Reduces the Power Recharge time by -8 %.

name: Lion Medallion
description:
An old medallion depicting a brave lion.It was made when the Raccoon Police Station was still an art museum.
Increases the Throw distance of Survivors grabbed Mid-Bound by +30 %.

name: Loose Crank
description:
To the person whose only tool is a crank, the whole world looks like a crank-shaped hole.
Increases your Movement speed during the Chain Bound Window by +15 %.

name: Egg (Gold)
description:
A highly coveted foodstuff.The cash worth is second only to its regenerative effects.
Increases the duration of the Chain Bound Window by +20 %.

name: Maiden Medallion
description:
A medallion depicting a beautiful maiden.Its purpose was unknown for many years.
Survivors suffer from the Blindness Status Effect for 60 seconds when they reach Critical Infection.

name: Portable Safe
description:
A small container that requires a complicated combination to unlock.
Survivors suffer from the Haemorrhage Status Effect until fully healed when injured using Virulent Bound.

name: Red Herb
description:
Acts as a reagent that strengthens the effect of that with which it is combined.
Increases the Healing time of the First Aid Spray by +2 seconds.

name: Video Conference Device
description:
Many intricate conspiracies were orchestrated on devices just like this one.
Reduces the Infection timer of Survivors by -30 %.

name: Dark Sunglasses
description:
Glasses enhanced with AR that grant the wearer an invaluable advantage on the battlefield.
Grants the Undetectable Status Effect for 20 seconds whenever a Survivors reaches Critical Infection.

name: Green Herb
description:
A common plant, usually known for its restorative properties.
Increases the Infection applied when colliding with Survivors Mid-Bound by +30 %.

name: Helicopter Stick
description:
Debris from a helicopter crash.Few jobs are more dangerous than a helicopter pilot's when Wesker is involved.
The Auras of Survivors are revealed to you for 8 seconds after using a First Aid Spray.

name: Uroboros Virus
description:
For some, the strength and resistance was worth the trade-off.
The Auras of Survivors are revealed to you for 4 seconds when they reach Critical Infection.
"The balance of the world is changing… and you're completely oblivious to it." — Ricardo Irving

name: Iridescent Uroboros Vial
description:
The perfect bio-weapon.Decades of research have led to this.
Causes all Survivors to start the Trial infected with Uroboros.
Survivors suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for 30 seconds when they reach Critical Infection.
"The entire world will be infected. A new Genesis is at hand and I will be the creator!" — Albert Wesker

name: Lab Photo
description:
Wesker was as much a researcher as he was a guinea pig for Umbrella's bio-weapons.
Grants the ability to break Breakable Walls or Pallets when colliding with them Mid-Bound.
You can no longer vault over Pallets using Virulent Bound.
"Only a handful of humans truly matter. Everyone else is just so much chaff. So now I have to separate this chaff from the wheat." — Albert Wesker

name: "The Beast" - Soot
description:
The Kunwulju symbol, representing the Realm of Fear, is finger-drawn out of soot on the body of the Bell.
Your Terror Radius is no longer suppressed when Cloaked.
Grants +100 % bonus Bloodpoints for Stalking and Surprise Attack Score Events.

name: "The Ghost" - Soot
description:
The Khugwemuu symbol, representing the Spirit World, is finger-drawn out of soot on the body of the Bell.
Your Terror Radius and Red Stain are suppressed for another 6 seconds after uncloaking.

name: "The Hound" - Soot
description:
The Wonnug symbol, representing a peerless tracker, is finger-drawn out of soot on the body of the Bell.
When Cloaked, Pools of Blood appear to you in bright red.

name: "The Serpent" - Soot
description:
The Laokeye symbol, representing cunning, is finger-drawn out of soot on the body of the Bell.
Breaking Breakable Walls or Pallets by any means, or performing the Damage Generator action on incomplete Generators, will cause you to automatically uncloak.

name: "Blind Warrior" - Mud
description:
The Baikra-Kaeug symbol, representing ferocity, is finger-drawn in mud on the body of the bell.
Survivors hit with a Surprise Attack suffer from the Blindness Status Effect for 60 seconds.

name: "Blink" - Mud
description:
The Kratin symbol, representing quick passing, is finger-drawn in mud on the body of the Bell.
Reduces the Cloaking time by -40 %.

name: "Swift Hunt" - Mud
description:
The Kuntin-Takkho symbol, representing a rapid descent on a prey, is finger-drawn in mud on the body of the Bell.
Reduces the Uncloaking time by -8 %.

name: "Windstorm" - Mud
description:
The Ohuwe-Onmnea symbol, representing a howling storm, is finger-drawn in mud on the body of the Bell.
Increases your Movement Speed while Cloaked by +5 %.

name: Bone Clapper
description:
A Bell clapper made from a highly polished piece of bone.Causes the sounds of the Wailing Bell to echo and warp chaotically.
Survivors are unable to discern the distance and direction of the Wailing Bell.

name: "Blind Warrior" - White
description:
The Baikra-Kaeug symbol, representing ferocity, is stamped in white ink on the body of the bell.
Survivors hit with a Surprise Attack suffer from the Haemorrhage and Mangled Status Effects for 70 seconds.

name: "Blink" - White
description:
The Kratin symbol, representing quick passing, is stamped in white ink on the body of the Bell.
Reduces the Cloaking time by -60 %.

name: "Shadow Dance" - White
description:
The Yiwarick symbol, representing dark synergy, is stamped in white ink on the body of the Bell.
Increases the Action speeds for breaking Breakable Walls and Pallets, damaging Generators, and vaulting Windows by +40 % while Cloaked.

name: "Swift Hunt" - White
description:
The Kuntin-Takkho symbol, representing a rapid descent on a prey, is stamped in white ink on the body of the Bell.
Reduces the Uncloaking time by -10 %.

name: "Windstorm" - White
description:
The Ohuwe-Onmnea symbol, representing a howling storm, is stamped in white ink on the body of the Bell.
Increases your Movement Speed while Cloaked by +7 %.

name: "All Seeing" - Blood
description:
The Kra-Frabai symbol, representing The Entity watching over us, is stamped in blood on the head of the bell.
Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability while Cloaked:
The Auras of Survivors are revealed to you within 8 metres of your location.

name: "Shadow Dance" - Blood
description:
The Yiwarick symbol, representing dark synergy, is stamped in blood on the body of the Bell.
Increases the Action speeds for breaking Breakable Walls and Pallets, damaging Generators, and vaulting Windows by +60 % when Cloaked.

name: "Swift Hunt" - Blood
description:
The Kuntin-Takkho symbol, representing a rapid descent on a prey, is stamped in blood on the body of the Bell.
Reduces the Uncloaking time by -12 %.

name: "Windstorm" - Blood
description:
The Ohuwe-Onmnea symbol, representing a howling storm, is stamped in blood on the body of the Bell.
Increases your Movement Speed while Cloaked by +9 %.

name: "All Seeing" - Spirit
description:
The Kra-Frabai symbol, representing The Entity watching over us, ominously glows on the head of the bell.
Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability while Cloaked:
The intensity of the Generator Auras reveals their current Repair progress.

name: Coxcombed Clapper
description:
A simple coxcomb knotted rope wrapped around the bell clapper to muffle its sound.A malevolent Aura emanates from it.
Silences the Wailing Bell.

name: Gifted Bamboo Comb
description:
A narrow tooth bamboo comb to gently untangle dishevelled hair.
Increases the Charge speed of Yamaoka's Haunting by +15 %.

name: Origami Crane
description:
One of the one thousand Orizuru for your wish to come true.
Increases the Recharge rate of Yamaoka's Haunting by +20 %.

name: Shiawase Amulet
description:
A talisman that makes one happy and enthusiastic.
Increases the Duration of a Phase-Walk by +0.5 seconds.

name: Zōri
description:
